compiled_state.title: Add TypeScript add-parameter entry to recipe-registry.yaml and update registry tests
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Description
Add the TypeScript add-parameter recipe entry to recipes/recipe-registry.yaml, and update tests/scripts/test-recipe-registry.sh to assert the new entry exists and validates correctly.

### Registry entry to add:
```yaml
- name: add-parameter
  language: typescript
  engine: ts-morph
  adapter: ts-morph-adapter.sh
  capability_description: "Add a parameter to a TypeScript function signature and update all callers across the project using ts-morph's TS compiler reference graph"
  scope: cross-file
  min_engine_version: "17.0.0"
  installation_instructions: "npm install ts-morph@>=17"
```

### Test update:
Add test_registry_has_add_parameter_typescript to tests/scripts/test-recipe-registry.sh that asserts:
- An entry with name=add-parameter and language=typescript exists
- The entry passes JSON schema validation

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] recipe-registry.yaml contains TypeScript add-parameter entry
  Verify: python3 -c "import yaml; r=yaml.safe_load(open('recipes/recipe-registry.yaml')); assert any(e.get('name')=='add-parameter' and e.get('language')=='typescript' for e in r['recipes'])"
- [ ] TypeScript entry passes schema validation
  Verify: python3 -c "import yaml,json,jsonschema; schema=json.load(open('recipes/schemas/recipe-registry-schema.json')); r=yaml.safe_load(open('recipes/recipe-registry.yaml')); [jsonschema.validate(e,schema) for e in r['recipes']]"
- [ ] test-recipe-registry.sh tests pass (including new TypeScript test)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-recipe-registry.sh
